evidencePolicy.strong: official documentation, regulator filings, official protocol specs, issuer pages, peer-reviewed or canonical papers
evidencePolicy.medium: institutional research, reputable data providers, serious media used as context
evidencePolicy.weak: blogs, tutorials, community posts used only as leads

sources.title: Polymarket Documentation
sources.notes: Official developer documentation for market data, orders, and CLOB interactions.

sources.title: Polymarket Prices & Orderbook
sources.notes: States that Polymarket uses a Central Limit Order Book and prices emerge from supply and demand.

sources.title: Polymarket Geographic Restrictions
sources.notes: Official API guidance on geoblock checks and rejected orders from blocked regions.

sources.title: Polymarket US
sources.notes: Polymarket US describes itself as a CFTC-regulated Designated Contract Market.

sources.title: CFTC Orders Event-Based Binary Options Markets Operator to Pay $1.4 Million Penalty
sources.notes: CFTC enforcement release for Polymarket's 2022 order.

sources.title: Ethereum staking
sources.notes: Official staking overview, including 32 ETH validator deposit.

sources.title: Proof-of-stake (PoS)
sources.notes: Official proof-of-stake mechanism and validator responsibilities.

sources.title: EIP-1559: Fee market change
sources.notes: Protocol specification for base fee adjustment and fee burn mechanics.

sources.title: Cancun-Deneb (Dencun) FAQ
sources.notes: Official Dencun / EIP-4844 explanation focused on L2 fee reduction via blobs.

sources.title: SEC Release No. 34-100224 spot Ether ETF approval order
sources.notes: SEC order approving spot Ether exchange-traded product rule changes.

sources.title: iShares Ethereum Trust ETF
sources.notes: Issuer page for spot ETH ETF exposure and current fund data.

sources.title: Logarithmic Market Scoring Rules for Modular Combinatorial Information Aggregation
sources.notes: Canonical market scoring rule reference; useful for prediction market math even though Polymarket uses CLOB.

sources.title: DeepLOB: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks for Limit Order Books
sources.notes: Limit order book deep learning reference for mid-price movement forecasting.

sources.title: The price impact of order book events
sources.notes: Empirical market microstructure paper on order book event impact.

sources.title: 101 Formulaic Alphas
sources.notes: Open glimpse into formulaic alpha construction and backtesting concerns.

sources.title: Time Series Momentum
sources.notes: Cross-asset momentum predictability paper and dataset reference.

sources.title: Jane Street Trading, Research, Tech
sources.notes: Public company description of quantitative analysis and market mechanics.

sources.title: Two Sigma Quantitative Research & Data Science
sources.notes: Public company page describing scientific approach and data-driven research roles.

sources.title: Polymarket US Fee Schedule
sources.notes: Fee and rebate schedule for Polymarket US; international fee details may differ.

reflectLoop.delta_query: Refresh Polymarket regulatory status, fee schedule, ETH ETF current status, Ethereum protocol docs
reflectLoop.action_taken: Searched official docs, CFTC, Polymarket US, Ethereum docs, SEC and issuer pages
reflectLoop.remaining_risk: Polymarket regulatory and fee status can change; refresh again before final HTML delivery.

reflectLoop.delta_query: Use public company pages and canonical papers instead of claiming proprietary model details
reflectLoop.action_taken: Added public Jane Street, Two Sigma, WorldQuant, AQR and LOB papers
reflectLoop.remaining_risk: Report must phrase top quant company workflow as public-inference, not confirmed internal secret.
